treatment_information.dosage_or_details: lesional mandibular gingival hyperplastic tissue obtained for variant analysis

treatment_information.specific_treatment: variant analysis of somatic overgrowth genes
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: PIK3CA, AKT1, AKT3, GNAQ, GNA11, MTOR, PIK3R2 genes analyzed
treatment_information.treatment_response: PIK3CAc.1571G>A; pArg524Lys identified at low mosaic level

treatment_timeline.event: Initial presentation with congenital maxillary and mandibular alveolar soft tissue enlargement
Panoramic radiograph revealed abnormal trabeculation and missing teeth
Cone beam computerized tomography (CBCT) disclosed osseous abnormalities
Phase one of orthodontic treatment completed

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Retained primary teeth will be maintained for as long as possible. After puberty, quality of bone will be assessed for dental implants or fixed partial prosthesis. Surgical contouring of the jaws will be performed if cosmetically necessary.
